meta.description: Distributor of laboratory and medical equipment in Kazakhstan. Analyzers, reagents, microscopes, PCR equipment.

hero.title: Laboratory Equipment for Kazakhstan Healthcare
hero.subtitle: Supply, installation and service of professional laboratory equipment. Official distributor of leading global brands.

categories.title: Equipment Categories
categories.subtitle: Full range of laboratory and medical equipment

why_us.title: Why Choose LabTech
why_us.item1_text: Direct contracts with manufacturers. Original equipment with warranty.
why_us.item2_text: Own service center. Specialist visits throughout Kazakhstan.
why_us.item3_text: Training and instruction for laboratory and technical staff.
why_us.item4_text: Warehouse in Almaty. Delivery across Kazakhstan from 1 business day.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: LabTech LLP is Kazakhstan's leading distributor of laboratory and medical equipment since 2008.
about.mission_text: To provide Kazakhstan's laboratories with reliable, certified equipment from the world's leading manufacturers.
about.value1_text: Only original equipment with conformity certificates
about.value2_text: 15 years on the market, 300+ satisfied clients across Kazakhstan
about.value3_text: Team of certified specialists with experience in laboratory diagnostics

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We provide the full cycle — from supply to service
services.item1_text: Official supply from world's leading manufacturers.
services.item2_text: Professional installation by our certified specialists.
services.item4_text: Scheduled maintenance, repair, supply of consumables and reagents.
services.item5_text: Help selecting equipment for your laboratory's needs. Free consultation.
services.item6_text: Warranty on all equipment. Replacement in case of manufacturing defect.
